question: Is the image a realistic photo of a small bathroom viewed from an overhead, slightly tilted angle?
Is there a white enamel bathtub occupying the right half of the frame, positioned vertically?
Is there exactly 1 dark gray non-slip mat with fine raised dots and rounded corners inside the bathtub?
Are there exactly 7 rubber ducks arranged in a vertical column with tight spacing along the upper right edge of the bathtub?
Does the group of ducks consist of exactly 5 bright yellow, 1 matte black, and 1 completely transparent duck?
Do the beaks of all 7 rubber ducks face left?
Is there a silver showerhead on the wall upper left of the bathtub, facing downward with water stain reflections on the edge?
Are there exactly 3 towels arranged in a fan shape with slight overlap on the floor below the bathtub?
Is the towel layering order: grass green (top), dark blue (middle), and white (bottom)?
Is there a white ceramic sink positioned on the left side of the frame?
Is there a silver faucet on the sink pointing to the right?
Are there exactly 3 pump-style hand soap bottles side by side along the right edge of the sink?
Do the soap bottle bodies match the description: transparent, frosted milky white, and light gray, all with white pump heads?
Is there a rectangular mirror above the sink with slightly fogged corners and a clearly reflective center?
Are there exactly 2 hair dryers in the lower center area of the frame?
Is the left hair dryer matte white with a black nozzle pointing lower right?
Is the right hair dryer transparent acrylic with visible internal structure and a nozzle pointing left?
Are both hair dryer cords coiled in tight circles and partially overlapping?
Are there exactly 3 combs/brushes arranged in a row above the hair dryers?
Is the arrangement from left to right: light wood round brush (dark bristles), black wide-tooth comb, silver fine-tooth comb?
Do all comb/brush teeth (or bristles) point upward?
Is there a stack of exactly 2 folded white bath towels forming a square block in the lower left corner?
Is there an orange short-haired cat sitting beside the folded towels?
Is the cat's tail wrapped around to the front and ears facing toward the bathtub?
Is there a small white curly-haired dog standing on the grass green towel in the lower right?
Is the dog's head facing toward the bathtub?
Is there a stainless steel water bowl positioned in front right of the small dog?
Is the water bowl half full with fine highlight reflections on the surface?
